base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_ridleys_lair — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 metroid. Ridley's Lair atlas — purple/pink alien metal corridors. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ridley's Lair atlas — purple/pink alien metal corridors; Ridley boss-approach aesthetic
